authorizationItems.name: Reviewer identity
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: A real human reviewer must be named before write mode.
authorizationItems.evidence: Generated checks cannot identify a human reviewer.

authorizationItems.name: Scope limit
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human reviewer must accept scope limited to rewrite_batch_01 and rewrite_batch_05.
authorizationItems.writeImpact: Allows only blank-overlay initialization for the first reviewer scope after human decision.

authorizationItems.name: Frozen packet
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Reviewer must use the frozen packet as day-of-review sequence.

authorizationItems.name: Sequence consistency
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Reviewer must not skip ordered gates.

authorizationItems.name: Write readiness lock
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human decision is still required even though the lock is ready.

authorizationItems.name: Dry-run initializer
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human must run dry-run immediately before any later write.
authorizationItems.writeImpact: Previews write shape without creating real notes.

authorizationItems.name: Overwrite protection
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human must stop if a real overlay appears.
authorizationItems.writeImpact: Protects future human notes from accidental overwrite.

authorizationItems.name: Direct candidates
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human must confirm, downgrade, or block each direct candidate in sourceFitNotes.
authorizationItems.writeImpact: Blocks source confirmation and learner-facing evidence upgrades.

authorizationItems.name: Blank notes
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human notes must start blank and be written from actual review work.
authorizationItems.writeImpact: Blocks treating generated scaffolding as evidence.

authorizationItems.name: Generated-sample boundary
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Generated prompts, examples, drills, checklists, and freeze packets cannot be copied as real notes.
authorizationItems.evidence: All upstream reports keep learnerFacingRelease:false and approvalStatus:not_approved.

authorizationItems.name: Green-only evidence boundary
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human must keep yellow/red/research_only outside learner-facing evidence.
authorizationItems.evidence: Dry-run and freeze hard stops include yellow/red/research_only isolation.

authorizationItems.name: Launch and approval boundary
authorizationItems.humanRequirement: Human cannot infer approval, commercial readiness, internal trial, launch, or production readiness from this preview.

hardStops: Do not run write mode from generated authorization preview alone.
Stop if a real human reviewer has not been identified.
Stop if scope expands beyond rewrite_batch_01 and rewrite_batch_05.
Stop if generated prompts, examples, drills, checklists, or packet rows are treated as real reviewer notes.
Stop if direct candidates are treated as confirmed without original human sourceFitNotes.
Stop if any artifact implies approval, learner-facing release, commercial_ready promotion, internalTrialReady, launchReady, or productionReady.
Stop if notes or lesson text include trading advice, signals, performance claims, broker/order workflow, automation, copied external source prose, or real-money guidance.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This authorization preview is generated reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not authorize write mode, create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, promote grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, launch the course, or make the product production-ready.
